---

This action plan is meant to supplement the Meta Ads Manual (10xdownload.com/fba1)
to make sure you’re crystal clear on the actions to take to get your desired results. When in
doubt, refer to the manual!
While this is meant to empower you to get ads up and running, keep in mind that they can
ultimately be run by a team member or an agency. Good luck!
Get Ads Launched and Make Your First Sale!

1

may already have…

INSTALL META PIXEL ON PAGES	STEP
2
Your pixel is what will help you track results and send important information back to
Meta based on your users activity (visits, opt-ins, purchases, etc). These activities are
commonly referred to as events.
Pixel data and events help Meta best optimize your ads and give you the
opportunity to create custom audiences. You only need one pixel and it should be
installed on every website and funnel you own.
• Pixel, Conversions, Audiences Tutorial (10xresource.com/fba4)
• Installing Pixels on Clickfunnels (10xresource.com/fba27)
• Pixel Installation Document (10xresource.com/fba18)
• Conversion Events Document (10xresource.com/fba19)
CREATE IMAGE OR VIDEO AD CREATIVE	STEP
3
You will create many ads, so keep it simple at first to get up and running. As you
will see in the provided swipe files, ads don’t need to be fancy to make money.
For example, you can use your phone to record video ads. There are also
easy-to-use tools to help you produce professional quality video and image
based ads (see below).
• Meta Ads Swipe File (10xresource.com/fba7)
• Create Image Ads (10xresource.com/canva)
• Create Video Ads (10xresource.com/promo)

-- 2 of 5 --

SET UP CAMPAIGN, ADSET AND AD	STEP
4
These are the steps to get your ad live in the ad manager. There are 3 major steps to
create and launch an ad, each with many options and settings…
CUSTOMIZE AD MANAGER COLUMNS	STEP
5
In order to get a clear picture of your ad performance, you will want to customize the
columns to show you what matters most.
Each Campaign can have unlimited Ad Sets and each Ad Set can have unlimited
ads. Any type of Meta Ad (referred to as a “post” in the ad manager) can be used in
any number of Campaigns or Ad Sets.
• Campaign and Ad Setup Tutorial (10xresource.com/fba2)
• Meta Ad Creation Checklist (10xdownload.com/fba5)
• Meta Ad Strategy Flowchart (10xdownload.com/fba3)
• Ad Campaign Basics Document ( 10xresource.com/fba15)
• Ad Set Level Overview Document ( 10xresource.com/fba16)
• Ad Level Options Document (10xresource.com/fba17)
• Audience Creation Document (10xresource.com/fba20)
• Lookalike Audience Document (10xresource.com/fba21)
Recommended Resource:
• Customizing Ad Manager Tutorial (10xresource.com/fba3)

-- 3 of 5 --

• Meta Ad Optimization Checklist (10xdownload.com/fba6)
• Creating Reports Document (10xresource.com/fba22)
• Understanding Results Document (10xresource.com/fba23)
MONITOR, TEST, TWEAK AND SCALE	STEP
6
You should check on your ads daily and make adjustments as needed. There are
many factors involved, but ultimately, you will be trying new audiences and
adjusting budgets based on performance.
Note that (fundamentally) Meta will also be working to optimize your ads. The
algorithm’s job is to help you succeed by seeking out the right people to display
your ads to. Be sure to give this process adequate time.
It is also important that you are continually creating new ads while testing
existing ones. This will help fightt ad fatigue, and more importantly, help you find
the winning message for your audience.
NOTE: More details are provided in the manual as well as on the checklist
overview video.
MAKE YOUR FIRST SALE AND CELEBRATE!	STEP
7
Keep in mind that Meta Ad success won’t happen overnight. Success will often
come in breakthroughs, and when it does, it can be highly profitable!
Recommended Resource:
